sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57810" key="kle/ptis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλέπτ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλέπτης</foreign>, <sense id="n57810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she-thief</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
